title: PDF Automator Tool
description: An AI-assisted PDF management tool that automates extraction, transformation, and structuring of messy document data into actionable insights.

title: Neon Dashboard UI
description: A minimalist dark mode dashboard built entirely with frontend technologies. Focuses on speed, responsiveness, and a cyber-punk aesthetic.

title: ETL Data Pipeline
description: A robust data pipeline designed to handle large volumes of real-world data, transforming it for analytical processing and reporting.
